flags.title: Save the Shave Bundle (B0GT1H84JM) — $129.59 Jul 20 / $0 attributed — Day 12+ KILL
flags.problem: Save the Shave Bundle spent $129.59 on Jul 20 (Supermetrics Query B) with $0 14d same-SKU attributed sales. Kill floor 1.32 (breakeven unconfirmed). 7d cumulative spend $1,302.88 with $0 7d attributed sales. No Amazon write connector — auto-kill not possible. Manual pause directive has been staged for 12+ consecutive daily runs without being actioned.

solutions.recommendation: Pause ALL Save the Shave Bundle (B0GT1H84JM) campaigns in Amazon Ads Console immediately. Every day delayed is ~$130 in zero-return spend.
solutions.action: Amazon Ads → Campaigns → filter by SKU C8-VG2F-6714 / ASIN B0GT1H84JM → pause all active campaigns. Confirm $0 daily spend thereafter.

flags.problem: Slicker Brush (liquidate=true in roas_bands.json) spent $1.37 on Jul 20 and $5.48 cumulatively over 7 days. Policy explicit: any ad spend > $0 = immediate flag. Violation ongoing since approximately Jul 8. No Amazon write connector — manual pause required.

solutions.recommendation: Manually pause all Slicker Brush campaigns in Amazon Ads Console. Confirm $0 daily spend for 7 consecutive days before clearing flag.
solutions.action: Amazon Ads → Campaigns → filter by B0FQ628KCH (SKU 6H-JCY0-JARS) → pause all active campaigns.

flags.title: Dematter TACOS 92.3% — 2.6x target (7d: $1,381 spend / $1,496 SC sales)
flags.problem: Emergency Dematter 7d TACOS = $1,381.60 / $1,496.59 = 92.3% vs 35% target. Jul 20 single-day ROAS 1.823 (YELLOW band, breakeven 2.07). Both organic keywords TOP_10. Paid spend consuming ~92% of every SC revenue dollar — unsustainable margin trajectory despite YELLOW ROAS signal.

solutions.recommendation: Reduce keyword bids 10-15% on highest-spend B0FQL56V99 campaigns to compress TACOS. Organic TOP_10 — paid does not need to dominate; allow organic to carry rank while paid converts at lower cost.
solutions.action: Amazon Ads → B0FQL56V99 campaigns → active keyword bids → apply -10% to -15% reduction on keywords where organic rank is TOP_10 ('detangler for dogs', 'dematting comb for dogs'). Do NOT pause. Monitor TACOS daily 3 days.

solutions.recommendation: Before any new Dematter creative launch, audit emergency-dematter-cream landing page on mobile for price clarity, CTA visibility, and checkout friction.
solutions.action: Visit skipthegroomer.com/products/emergency-dematter-cream on mobile. Verify: page loads fast, price visible above fold, CTA clear, product matches ad. Per L-2026-07-16-001: CTR strong; drop-off is post-click.

flags.title: Klaviyo — 0 sends across all flows, 3rd consecutive week. Browse Abandonment: DRAFT
flags.problem: All 5 Klaviyo flows show zero recipients for the 3rd consecutive week (Welcome Series, Abandoned Cart, Warranty, Registration all live but 0 sends; Browse Abandonment DRAFT). Email revenue 7d: $0. Zero recipients across ALL live flows indicates a Shopify-Klaviyo integration break, not just a draft-status issue.

solutions.recommendation: Activate Browse Abandonment immediately AND diagnose Shopify-Klaviyo sync break. Zero across all live flows = connector issue.
solutions.action: 1) Klaviyo → Flows → Browse Abandonment (ID: Rn6AGa) → set to Live. 2) Klaviyo → Integrations → Shopify → verify sync active, last-synced within 24h. If broken: reconnect. 3) Test with dummy session, confirm event in Klaviyo within 15 min.

solutions.action: Contact Angelo/accountant to import Jul 12+ transactions into QB. Do not make budget/cash decisions based on QB MTD until sync restored. Daily P&L: use H10 Profits dashboard.

advisor_solutions.data: $1,381.60 7d spend / $1,496.59 7d SC sales = 92.3% TACOS. Single-day ROAS 1.823 YELLOW band (breakeven 2.07).

solutions.recommendation: Reduce keyword bids 10-15% on highest-spend B0FQL56V99 campaigns to compress TACOS while organic remains TOP_10.
solutions.rationale: Both organic keywords TOP_10 — rank defended without full paid aggression. Bid reduction compresses TACOS without sacrificing rank. Per L-2026-07-08-001: check organic rank before scaling paid; TACOS was 140%+ when learning captured.
solutions.action: Amazon Ads → B0FQL56V99 campaigns → active keyword bids → -10% to -15% on TOP_10 organic keywords. Monitor TACOS daily 3 days.

solutions.rationale: Per L-2026-07-16-001 DOCTRINE: CTR strong but ROAS below breakeven on prior campaigns — post-click conversion chain is the failure point. Same risk applies if TACOS pressure drives creative changes.
